articles.title: Introduction to VNDManuf
articles.summary: Overview of the VNDManuf Dash application and its role in manufacturing, sales and training.
articles.purpose: Orient new users to the application structure before using operational modules.

steps.title: Launch the application
steps.body: Open the VNDManuf Dash UI. The header shows VNDManuf branding and a logo; an API connectivity alert appears if the FastAPI backend at http://127.0.0.1:8000 is unavailable (Demo Mode uses sample data).

steps.title: Understand main navigation
steps.body: Use the top-level tabs: Manufacturing, Contacts, Sales, CRM, Reports, Settings, and Nova U.

steps.title: Know the backend
steps.body: Business logic and persistence run through the FastAPI API mounted at /api/v1 (products, inventory, work orders, sales, CRM, documents, training, etc.).

articles.title: VNDManuf Navigation Basics
articles.summary: How to move between Manufacturing sub-tabs, Sales sub-tabs, and other main areas.
articles.purpose: Reduce navigation errors when switching between operational tasks.

steps.title: Select a main tab
steps.body: Click Manufacturing, Contacts, Sales, CRM, Reports, Settings, or Nova U in the main tab bar (id: main-tabs).

steps.title: Manufacturing sub-tabs
steps.body: Under Manufacturing: Products, Assemblies, Batch Processing, Work Orders, Inventory, Batch Reports, RM Reports, Stocktake.

steps.title: Sales sub-tabs
steps.body: Under Sales: Orders, Overview, Customers, Products, Analytics, Import / Export, Settings.

steps.title: Settings sub-tabs
steps.body: Under Settings: Runtime Config, Units, Excise Rates, Purchase Formats, QC Tests, Work Areas, Conditions.

articles.title: API Connectivity and Demo Mode
articles.summary: How the UI detects FastAPI availability and falls back to sample data.
articles.purpose: Help users interpret the connectivity banner and know when data is live vs sample.

steps.title: Check the alert banner
steps.body: On tab change the UI calls GET /health. If the API is unreachable, demo-mode-alert shows: 'Demo Mode: API server not available. Using sample data.'

steps.title: Start the API
steps.body: Ensure the FastAPI server is running on port 8000 before performing production operations.

steps.title: Verify live data
steps.body: When connected, the alert is hidden. API requests go to http://127.0.0.1:8000/api/v1.

articles.title: Creating Products in VNDManuf
articles.summary: Create a new product record from Manufacturing → Products.
articles.purpose: Establish SKU master data for inventory, formulas and sales.
articles.prerequisites: Appropriate product type and unit definitions configured in Settings → Units.

steps.title: Open Products
steps.body: Manufacturing → Products sub-tab (pages_enhanced layout).

steps.title: Click Add Product
steps.body: Use add-product-btn to open the product modal.

steps.title: Enter identification
steps.body: Complete fields including SKU (product-sku), name (product-name), description, EAN-13, and product type (RAW, WIP, FINISHED).

steps.title: Set capabilities
steps.body: Configure is_purchase, is_sell, is_assemble flags and related purchase/assembly/sales sections as required.

steps.title: Save
steps.body: Submit via the modal save action; the UI calls POST /api/v1/products/.

risks.prevention: Search products-table before creating; SKU must be unique.

articles.troubleshooting: If save fails, check the toast notification for API validation errors.

articles.title: Editing and Duplicating Products
articles.summary: Modify or duplicate an existing product from the Products table.
articles.purpose: Maintain accurate product master data over time.

steps.title: Select a row
steps.body: Click a product in products-table.

steps.title: Edit
steps.body: Use edit-product-btn to load the product into the modal; save calls PUT /api/v1/products/{id}.

steps.title: Duplicate
steps.body: Use duplicate-product-btn to copy an existing product as a starting point.

steps.title: Delete
steps.body: Use delete-product-btn where permitted; confirm before removing.

steps.title: Refresh
steps.body: Use products-refresh to reload from GET /api/v1/products/.

articles.title: Product Capability Filters
articles.summary: Filter the product list by purchase, sell and assemble capabilities.
articles.purpose: Quickly find products by how they are used in the business.

steps.title: Open Products
steps.body: Manufacturing → Products.

steps.title: Apply filters
steps.body: Use filter-purchase, filter-sell, and filter-assemble toggles to narrow products-table.

steps.title: Review results
steps.body: Filtered rows reflect products matching the selected capability flags.

articles.title: Adjusting Product Inventory from Products Page
articles.summary: Adjust on-hand stock for a product from the product detail panel.
articles.purpose: Correct inventory without a full stocktake when authorised.

steps.title: Select product
steps.body: Open a product row to view product-detail-stock.

steps.title: Adjust inventory
steps.body: Click adjust-inventory-btn and enter the adjustment details.

steps.title: Confirm API update
steps.body: The callback posts to inventory movement endpoints under /api/v1/inventory/.

articles.title: Inventory Lots Overview
articles.summary: View inventory lots from Manufacturing → Inventory.
articles.purpose: Monitor lot-level stock held in the system.

steps.title: Open Inventory
steps.body: Manufacturing → Inventory sub-tab.

steps.title: Refresh data
steps.body: Click inventory-refresh to load GET /api/v1/inventory/lots.

steps.title: Review inventory-table
steps.body: Columns show lot codes, products, quantities and related lot metadata.

articles.title: Stock on Hand API and Product SOH
articles.summary: How stock-on-hand is retrieved per product and across products.
articles.purpose: Support reconciliation between UI displays and API data.

steps.title: Single product SOH
steps.body: GET /api/v1/inventory/product/{product_id}/soh returns stock for one product.

steps.title: All products SOH
steps.body: GET /api/v1/inventory/products/soh returns aggregated stock levels.

steps.title: Product summary
steps.body: GET /api/v1/inventory/product/{product_id}/summary provides inventory summary for a product.

articles.title: Conducting a Stocktake in VNDManuf
articles.summary: Run a physical stocktake using Manufacturing → Stocktake.
articles.purpose: Reconcile system inventory with counted quantities and post adjustments.

steps.title: Open Stocktake
steps.body: Manufacturing → Stocktake.

steps.title: Set session details
steps.body: Enter stocktake-date, stocktake-ref, and stocktake-counter.

steps.title: Load sheet
steps.body: Click stocktake-start to fetch GET /api/v1/inventory/stocktake/sheet.

steps.title: Enter counts
steps.body: Edit counted quantities in stocktake-table (editable Counted Qty column).

steps.title: Calculate variances
steps.body: Use stocktake-calc to compute differences.

steps.title: Apply adjustments
steps.body: Use stocktake-update to POST /api/v1/inventory/stocktake and create adjustment movements.

steps.title: Import/export
steps.body: Optional: stocktake-import and stocktake-export for spreadsheet workflows.

risks.prevention: Calculate variances and investigate large deltas first.

articles.title: Inventory Movements and Adjustments
articles.summary: API endpoints for recording inventory movements and adjustments.
articles.purpose: Document how stock changes are persisted outside stocktake.

steps.title: Review movement endpoints
steps.body: POST endpoints under /api/v1/inventory/ record movements (see inventory.py for receipt, issue, adjustment routes).

steps.title: Link to work orders
steps.body: Material issues from work orders also affect inventory via work order issue endpoints.

steps.title: Verify lot balances
steps.body: After movements, confirm lots via GET /api/v1/inventory/lots or product lots endpoint.

articles.title: RM Reports — Usage, Valuation and Reorder
articles.summary: Raw material reporting from Manufacturing → RM Reports.
articles.purpose: Analyse usage, stock valuation and reorder requirements.

steps.title: Open RM Reports
steps.body: Manufacturing → RM Reports.

steps.title: Select report type
steps.body: Choose rm-report-type: Usage Report, Stock Valuation, or Reorder Analysis.

steps.title: Generate
steps.body: Reports call /api/v1/reports/raw-materials/usage, /reports/stock-valuation, and /reports/reorder-analysis.

articles.title: Managing Assemblies (Formulas)
articles.summary: Create and maintain assembly formulas under Manufacturing → Assemblies.
articles.purpose: Define bill-of-materials and formula revisions for production.

steps.title: Open Assemblies
steps.body: Manufacturing → Assemblies (FormulasPage).

steps.title: Search formulas
steps.body: Use formula-search-btn to find existing formulas.

steps.title: Add or edit
steps.body: formula-add-btn / formula-edit-btn open the formula editor.

steps.title: Manage revisions
steps.body: formula-revision-btn and formula-clone-btn manage formula versions.

steps.title: Print
steps.body: formula-print-btn generates printable formula output.

steps.title: Manage lines
steps.body: Add, edit and delete formula component lines; API: /api/v1/formulas/.

articles.title: Assembly and Disassembly Operations
articles.summary: Execute assemble and disassemble operations via the assemblies API.
articles.purpose: Convert components into finished/WIP products or break them down.

steps.title: Verify formula
steps.body: Confirm the active formula revision and component availability.

steps.title: Assemble
steps.body: POST /api/v1/assemblies/assemble with product, quantity and formula reference.

steps.title: Disassemble
steps.body: POST /api/v1/assemblies/disassemble to reverse an assembly where supported.

steps.title: Verify inventory
steps.body: Check lot balances after the operation completes.

articles.title: Batch Processing Page Status
articles.summary: The Batch Processing sub-tab is currently a placeholder in the UI.
articles.purpose: Set expectations for operators looking for batch processing screens.

steps.title: Navigate to Batch Processing
steps.body: Manufacturing → Batch Processing.

steps.title: Current behaviour
steps.body: BatchProcessingPage displays 'This page is currently unavailable.'

steps.title: Alternative workflows
steps.body: Use Work Orders and Batches API (/api/v1/batches/) for batch-related operations until UI is implemented.

articles.title: Work Orders Overview
articles.summary: Navigate and filter work orders in Manufacturing → Work Orders.
articles.purpose: Plan and track production jobs through their lifecycle.

steps.title: Open Work Orders
steps.body: Manufacturing → Work Orders.

steps.title: Use sub-tabs
steps.body: List, Detail, Rate Manager, and Batch Lookup.

steps.title: Filter list
steps.body: Apply wo-status-filter, wo-product-filter, wo-date-from, wo-date-to on wo-list-table.

steps.title: Create
steps.body: Use wo-create-btn to start a new work order (POST /api/v1/work-orders/).

articles.title: Work Order Status Lifecycle
articles.summary: Release, start, complete, reopen and void work orders.
articles.purpose: Ensure production jobs follow the correct status transitions.

steps.title: Draft / Hold
steps.body: New work orders start in Draft; may be placed on Hold.

steps.title: Release
steps.body: wo-release-btn → POST /work-orders/{id}/release moves to Released.

steps.title: Start
steps.body: wo-start-btn → POST /work-orders/{id}/start moves to In Progress.

steps.title: Complete
steps.body: Enter wo-complete-qty and submit wo-complete-submit-btn → POST /work-orders/{id}/complete.

steps.title: Reopen
steps.body: wo-reopen-btn → POST /work-orders/{id}/reopen from Complete.

steps.title: Void
steps.body: wo-void-btn → POST /work-orders/{id}/void cancels the job.

articles.title: Issuing Materials to Work Orders
articles.summary: Record material consumption against a work order.
articles.purpose: Maintain accurate batch traceability and inventory deductions.

steps.title: Open work order detail
steps.body: Select a work order and open the Detail sub-tab.

steps.title: Inputs tab
steps.body: Use wo-detail-tabs → Inputs to manage material issues.

steps.title: Issue materials
steps.body: Submit issues via wo-issue-submit-btn → POST /work-orders/{id}/issues.

steps.title: Verify genealogy
steps.body: Check Genealogy tab; API GET /work-orders/{id}/genealogy.

articles.title: Work Order QC Tests
articles.summary: Record quality test results on a work order.
articles.purpose: Document QC before batch release.

steps.title: Configure test types
steps.body: Settings → QC Tests defines available qc test types.

steps.title: Open QC tab
steps.body: Work order Detail → QC Tests (wo-detail-tabs).

steps.title: Record results
steps.body: Enter test values against configured QC test types for the work order.

steps.title: API reference
steps.body: GET /work-orders/qc-test-types lists types; QC results stored on work order.

articles.title: Work Order Costs and Overheads
articles.summary: View costs and add overheads to work orders.
articles.purpose: Support production costing and margin analysis.

steps.title: Costs tab
steps.body: Work order Detail → Costs shows cost breakdown.

steps.title: View costs API
steps.body: GET /work-orders/{id}/costs returns WorkOrderCostResponse.

steps.title: Add overheads
steps.body: POST /work-orders/{id}/overheads records overhead lines.

steps.title: Rate Manager
steps.body: Work Orders → Rate Manager sub-tab manages cost rates.

articles.title: Work Order Planned Quantity Adjustment
articles.summary: Adjust planned output quantity on a work order.
articles.purpose: Correct planning quantities before or during production.

steps.title: Open detail
steps.body: Select work order in Detail sub-tab.

steps.title: Edit planned qty
steps.body: Enter value in wo-planned-qty-input when editing is allowed (wo-detail-allow-input-edit).

steps.title: Save
steps.body: Click wo-planned-qty-save to PATCH the work order.

articles.title: Batch Reports in VNDManuf
articles.summary: Review batch history and variance from Manufacturing → Batch Reports.
articles.purpose: Analyse production batch performance over time.

steps.title: Open Batch Reports
steps.body: Manufacturing → Batch Reports.

steps.title: Set filters
steps.body: Select batch-report-year and batch-report-formula.

steps.title: Review tables
steps.body: Variance and history tables load from /api/v1/reports/batch-history.

articles.title: Managing Contacts
articles.summary: Create and maintain customer and supplier contacts.
articles.purpose: Centralise trading partner data for sales and purchasing.

steps.title: Open Contacts
steps.body: Main tab → Contacts.

steps.title: Search
steps.body: Use contacts-search-btn and contacts-clear-btn.

steps.title: Add contact
steps.body: contacts-add-btn opens modal with contacts-form-* fields.

steps.title: Edit / delete
steps.body: contacts-edit-btn and contacts-delete-btn; API /api/v1/contacts/.

steps.title: Set roles
steps.body: Mark is_customer, is_supplier flags; link xero_contact_id where applicable.

articles.title: Sales Orders List and Filters
articles.summary: Browse and filter sales orders under Sales → Orders.
articles.purpose: Find and open orders for fulfilment and invoicing.

steps.title: Open Sales → Orders
steps.body: Main tab Sales; default sub-tab Orders.

steps.title: Apply filters
steps.body: Use sales-orders-customer-filter, sales-orders-channel-filter, sales-orders-status-filter, sales-orders-type-filter, and date range filters.

steps.title: Review tables
steps.body: sales-orders-table lists orders; product summary table shows line aggregates.

steps.title: Refresh
steps.body: sales-orders-refresh reloads from /api/v1/sales/orders.

articles.title: Creating a Sales Order
articles.summary: Create a new sales order from Sales → Orders.
articles.purpose: Capture customer orders for dispatch and invoicing.

steps.title: New order
steps.body: Click sales-orders-new-order-btn.

steps.title: Complete header
steps.body: Fill sales-order-form-* fields: customer, channel, dates, delivery details.

steps.title: Add lines
steps.body: Enter products, quantities and pricing in the order line table.

steps.title: Submit
steps.body: sales-order-form-submit → POST /api/v1/sales/orders.

articles.title: Converting Orders to Delivery Dockets
articles.summary: Convert a confirmed sales order to a delivery docket.
articles.purpose: Create dispatch documentation linked to the sales order.

steps.title: Open order
steps.body: Select order and open detail modal (sales-orders-open-selected).

steps.title: Convert
steps.body: Click sales-order-convert-delivery → POST /sales/orders/{id}/convert-to-delivery.

steps.title: Print docket PDF
steps.body: sales-order-print-delivery generates Delivery_Docket.docx via POST /documents/generate.

steps.title: Picking list
steps.body: sales-order-print-picking-list prints picking documentation.

articles.title: Converting Orders to Invoices
articles.summary: Convert a sales order to an invoice record.
articles.purpose: Bill customers and sync to finance systems.

steps.title: Open order
steps.body: Select order in Sales → Orders.

steps.title: Convert to invoice
steps.body: sales-order-convert-invoice → POST /sales/orders/{id}/convert-to-invoice.

steps.title: Print invoice PDF
steps.body: sales-order-print-invoice uses Invoice.docx template via /documents/generate.

steps.title: Mark paid
steps.body: Invoice payment tracked via sales invoice endpoints.

articles.title: Sales Customers Dashboard
articles.summary: View customer KPIs and manage delivery sites under Sales → Customers.
articles.purpose: Monitor customer base and site-level delivery data.

steps.title: Open Customers
steps.body: Sales → Customers sub-tab.

steps.title: Review KPIs
steps.body: sales-customers-total, sales-customers-new, sales-customers-lifetime, sales-customers-last-order.

steps.title: Browse customers
steps.body: sales-customers-table from GET /sales/customers/dashboard.

steps.title: Manage sites
steps.body: sales-customer-sites-table; add sites via sales-add-site-* form → POST /sales/customer-sites.

articles.title: Sales Import and Export
articles.summary: Import and export sales data from Sales → Import / Export.
articles.purpose: Bulk load orders or extract sales data.

steps.title: Open Import / Export
steps.body: Sales → Import / Export sub-tab.

steps.title: Follow on-screen controls
steps.body: Import callbacks register via register_sales_import_callbacks.

steps.title: API import
steps.body: CSV import available via sales API import endpoints.

articles.title: Pricebooks and Sales Channels Settings
articles.summary: Configure sales channels, pricebooks and tags under Sales → Settings.
articles.purpose: Control pricing structures and channel-specific behaviour.

steps.title: Open Sales Settings
steps.body: Sales → Settings sub-tab.

steps.title: Channels
steps.body: CRUD /api/v1/sales/channels (archive/unarchive supported).

steps.title: Pricebooks
steps.body: CRUD /api/v1/sales/pricebooks and pricebook lines.

steps.title: Tags
steps.body: Manage /api/v1/sales/tags for order classification.

articles.title: CRM Customer Workspace
articles.summary: Use the CRM tab to manage customer relationships.
articles.purpose: Centralise sales history, activities and customer profile data.

steps.title: Open CRM
steps.body: Main tab → CRM (separate from Sales tab).

steps.title: Select rep and customer
steps.body: Use crm-active-rep, crm-account-scope, crm-customer-select.

steps.title: Date range
steps.body: Filter with crm-date-range.

steps.title: Workspace tabs
steps.body: Sales, Timeline, Profile, Sites, People (crm-workspace-tabs).

articles.title: CRM Timeline and Activity Logging
articles.summary: Log calls, visits, notes and emails in CRM Timeline.
articles.purpose: Preserve customer interaction history for the sales team.

steps.title: Open Timeline
steps.body: CRM workspace → Timeline tab.

steps.title: Capture activity
steps.body: Use crm-note-type, crm-note-category, crm-note-body fields.

steps.title: Submit
steps.body: Activity saved via POST /api/v1/crm/customers/{id}/activities.

steps.title: Review feed
steps.body: Timeline displays chronological activity history.

articles.title: CRM Staff and Sites Management
articles.summary: Manage customer sites and on-site staff in CRM.
articles.purpose: Track delivery locations and key contacts at customer premises.

steps.title: Sites tab
steps.body: CRM workspace → Sites.

steps.title: People tab
steps.body: CRM workspace → People; crm-staff-table lists staff.

steps.title: Add staff
steps.body: Use crm-add-staff-* form → POST /crm/customers/{id}/staff.

steps.title: Sites API
steps.body: Linked to /sales/customer-sites and CRM profile endpoints.

articles.title: CRM PDF Export
articles.summary: Export customer CRM data to PDF.
articles.purpose: Share customer profiles and activity summaries.

steps.title: Select customer
steps.body: Choose customer in CRM toolbar.

steps.title: Choose sections
steps.body: Select crm-export-sections checkboxes.

steps.title: Export
steps.body: crm-export-btn → POST /crm/customers/{id}/export-pdf.

articles.title: Generating Delivery Docket and Invoice PDFs
articles.summary: Generate PDF documents from Word templates via the documents API.
articles.purpose: Produce customer-facing delivery dockets and invoices.

steps.title: Trigger from sales
steps.body: Sales order modal print buttons call document generation.

steps.title: API call
steps.body: POST /api/v1/documents/generate with template_name (Delivery_Docket.docx or Invoice.docx), doc_type, and entity IDs.

steps.title: Download
steps.body: GET /documents/{id}/download returns the generated file.

steps.title: Async jobs
steps.body: Optional async_job with GET /documents/jobs/{job_id} when RQ/Redis configured.

articles.title: Settings — Units of Measure
articles.summary: Manage units and conversions under Settings → Units.
articles.purpose: Ensure consistent quantity handling across products and formulas.

steps.title: Open Settings → Units
steps.body: Settings tab → Units sub-tab.

steps.title: Manage units
steps.body: CRUD via /api/v1/units/ including /convert and /convert/alcohol.

articles.title: Settings — Excise Rates
articles.summary: Configure excise rates under Settings → Excise Rates.
articles.purpose: Support excise calculations on applicable products.

steps.title: Open Excise Rates
steps.body: Settings → Excise Rates.

steps.title: Manage rates
steps.body: CRUD /api/v1/excise-rates/; GET /excise-rates/current for active rate.

articles.title: Settings — Work Areas and QC Tests
articles.summary: Configure work areas and QC test types.
articles.purpose: Support work order routing and quality recording.

steps.title: Work Areas
steps.body: Settings → Work Areas; CRUD /api/v1/work-areas/.

steps.title: QC Tests
steps.body: Settings → QC Tests; qc-test-types-table managed by qc_test_types_callbacks.

articles.title: Shopify Webhook Integration
articles.summary: Shopify order and fulfilment webhooks processed by the API.
articles.purpose: Sync e-commerce orders into VNDManuf inventory and sales.
articles.prerequisites: Shopify webhook secret configured; API publicly reachable.

steps.title: Orders create
steps.body: POST /api/v1/shopify/webhooks/orders_create — HMAC verified; creates inventory reservations.

steps.title: Fulfillments
steps.body: POST /shopify/webhooks/fulfillments_create commits reservations.

steps.title: Cancellations/refunds
steps.body: Additional webhook handlers for cancel and refund events.

articles.title: Shopify Order Import and Inventory Push
articles.summary: Manual and scheduled Shopify sync operations.
articles.purpose: Import orders and push inventory levels to Shopify.

steps.title: Import orders
steps.body: POST /shopify/orders/import-historical and /orders/import-incremental.

steps.title: Push inventory
steps.body: POST /shopify/sync/push/{product_id} or /sync/push-all.

steps.title: UI status
steps.body: [VERIFY WITH OPERATOR] shopify_page.py exists but is not wired into main navigation — operations may be API/cron only (scripts/cron_reconcile_shopify.py).

articles.title: Reports Tab — Current Limitations
articles.summary: The main Reports tab UI is a placeholder; detailed reports live in Manufacturing sub-tabs.
articles.purpose: Direct users to working report modules.

steps.title: Open Reports tab
steps.body: Main tab → Reports.

steps.title: Current UI
steps.body: report-type, report-start-date, report-end-date, generate-report-btn return placeholder text.

steps.title: Working alternatives
steps.body: Use Manufacturing → Batch Reports, RM Reports, and Sales → Analytics for live reporting.

articles.title: Nova U — Browsing and Searching Articles
articles.summary: Find training articles in the Nova U tab.
articles.purpose: Locate SOPs and guides quickly.

steps.title: Open Nova U
steps.body: Main tab → Nova U.

steps.title: Search
steps.body: Enter nu-search-input and click nu-search-btn; optional nu-clear-btn.

steps.title: Filter
steps.body: Use nu-system-filter, nu-type-filter, nu-status-filter.

steps.title: Browse categories
steps.body: Select a node in nu-category-tree.

articles.title: Nova U — Creating and Editing Articles
articles.summary: Create or edit training articles in the Nova U editor modal.
articles.purpose: Author and maintain SOP content.

steps.title: New article
steps.body: Click nu-new-article-btn.

steps.title: Complete metadata
steps.body: nu-editor-title, nu-editor-content-type (sop/guide/checklist/reference), nu-editor-category, nu-editor-status, nu-editor-systems, nu-editor-summary.

steps.title: SOP tab
steps.body: Fill nu-editor-purpose, prerequisites, safety, steps, risks, troubleshooting, body.

steps.title: Links tab
steps.body: nu-editor-tags, nu-editor-loom-url, nu-editor-sharepoint-url.

steps.title: Rich content
steps.body: nu-rich-editor-surface with toolbar; optional nu-editor-video-embed.

steps.title: Save
steps.body: nu-editor-save-btn → POST or PUT /api/v1/training/articles.

articles.title: Nova U — Publishing Articles
articles.summary: Change article visibility using the status field.
articles.purpose: Control which articles appear in published searches and corpus export.

steps.title: Edit article
steps.body: Open editor via nu-edit-article-btn or card edit button.

steps.title: Set status
steps.body: nu-editor-status: Draft, Published, or Archived.

steps.title: Save
steps.body: Published articles appear in default list/search (status_filter=published).

steps.title: Archive via API
steps.body: DELETE /training/articles/{ref} sets status to archived (no delete button in UI).

articles.title: Nova U — LLM Corpus Export
articles.summary: Export the training corpus for RAG and in-house LLM indexing.
articles.purpose: Provide machine-readable training content.

steps.title: JSON export
steps.body: Header link 'LLM Corpus (JSON)' → GET /api/v1/training/corpus.

steps.title: Markdown export
steps.body: 'LLM Corpus (MD)' → GET /api/v1/training/corpus?format=markdown.

steps.title: Single article
steps.body: GET /training/corpus/{slug} returns llm_context block.

articles.title: Nova U — Media Upload for Rich Content
articles.summary: Upload images and videos for embedding in training articles.
articles.purpose: Support visual training content.

steps.title: Upload
steps.body: POST /api/v1/training/media/upload (max 80 MB; jpeg/png/gif/webp/mp4/webm/mov).

steps.title: Serve
steps.body: Returned URL /api/v1/training/media/{filename}.

steps.title: Embed
steps.body: Insert into nu-rich-editor-surface or set nu-editor-video-embed for Loom/YouTube/Vimeo.

articles.title: Batches API — Create and Finish
articles.summary: Production batch records via /api/v1/batches/ (UI placeholder exists).
articles.purpose: Record batch production outcomes when not using work orders alone.

steps.title: Create batch
steps.body: POST /api/v1/batches/ with work order and product references.

steps.title: Record actuals
steps.body: PUT endpoints for record-actual and qc-results on batch ID.

steps.title: Finish batch
steps.body: POST /batches/{id}/finish completes the batch.

steps.title: Print ticket
steps.body: GET /batches/{id}/print returns batch ticket text.

steps.title: History
steps.body: GET /batches/history/ for batch history listing.

articles.title: Settings — Purchase Formats
articles.summary: Configure how purchased quantities are expressed.
articles.purpose: Standardise purchase unit formats for raw materials.

steps.title: Open Purchase Formats
steps.body: Settings → Purchase Formats.

steps.title: Manage formats
steps.body: CRUD via purchase_formats_callbacks → /api/v1/purchase-formats/.

articles.title: Settings — Condition Types and Hazard Codes
articles.summary: Manage hazard codes and condition types.
articles.purpose: Classify products for safety and compliance display.

steps.title: Open Conditions
steps.body: Settings → Conditions sub-tab (condition_types_page).

steps.title: Hazard tab
steps.body: Hazard Codes tab (tab_id hazard).

steps.title: Condition types
steps.body: Condition Types tab (tab_id condition).

articles.title: Sales Order Backorders
articles.summary: Create backorders from sales orders when stock is insufficient.
articles.purpose: Track unfulfilled line quantities separately.

steps.title: Identify short lines
steps.body: Review order lines with insufficient stock.

steps.title: Create backorder
steps.body: POST /api/v1/sales/orders/{id}/backorder.

steps.title: Track fulfilment
steps.body: Monitor order status transitions (draft, confirmed, fulfilled, cancelled).

articles.title: Delivery Docket Updates
articles.summary: View and patch delivery docket records after conversion.
articles.purpose: Correct dispatch documentation before PDF generation.

steps.title: Retrieve docket
steps.body: GET /api/v1/sales/delivery-dockets/{id}.

steps.title: Update fields
steps.body: PATCH /sales/delivery-dockets/{id} for line quantities and metadata.

steps.title: Regenerate PDF
steps.body: Re-run document generation from Sales order print controls.

articles.title: Buying Groups and Sales Reps
articles.summary: CRM supporting master data for buying groups and sales representatives.
articles.purpose: Classify customers and attribute CRM activities to reps.

steps.title: Sales reps
steps.body: CRUD /api/v1/sales-reps/; selected in CRM via crm-active-rep.

steps.title: Buying groups
steps.body: CRUD /api/v1/buying-groups/; linked on CRM Profile tab.

steps.title: CRM usage
steps.body: crm_callbacks loads reps and buying groups for customer profile.

articles.title: Formula Cost Analysis Report
articles.summary: API endpoint for formula cost breakdown analysis.
articles.purpose: Support costing reviews outside the unmounted costing router.

steps.title: Call API
steps.body: GET /api/v1/reports/formulas/cost-analysis.

steps.title: Note
steps.body: /api/v1/costing/ router exists in costing.py but is not included in main.py — use reports endpoint or [VERIFY WITH OPERATOR] for costing UI.

articles.title: Product Purchase and Assembly Pricing Sections
articles.summary: Configure purchase, usage and assembly pricing on the product detail panel.
articles.purpose: Maintain unit costs and sell prices at product level.

steps.title: Open product
steps.body: Manufacturing → Products → select row.

steps.title: Purchase section
steps.body: Purchase accordion: formats, supplier pricing via purchase_usage_callbacks.

steps.title: Assembly section
steps.body: Assembly lines and BOM links managed in product_section_callbacks.

steps.title: Sales pricing
steps.body: Sales pricing fields on enhanced product page.

articles.title: Raw Materials API (Legacy)
articles.summary: Legacy raw materials endpoints parallel to unified products.
articles.purpose: Document API used by RM Reports and legacy integrations.

steps.title: List materials
steps.body: GET /api/v1/raw-materials/ and /raw-materials/groups.

steps.title: CRUD
steps.body: POST/PUT/DELETE /raw-materials/{id}.

steps.title: UI note
steps.body: No dedicated Raw Materials tab in Manufacturing nav — prefer Products with RAW type.

articles.title: VND-DAQ System Overview
articles.summary: Overview of the VND-DAQ distillation control Dash application.
articles.purpose: Orient operators to DAQ tabs and real-time control functions.

steps.title: Application start
steps.body: main.py starts DAQ loop thread, scale reader, optional IND560 and chiller threads, valve control, and AB sequencer before loading the Dash UI.

steps.title: Primary tabs
steps.body: Top-level dcc.Tabs: Live I/O, Alarms, Config, Event Log (dash_ui.py).

steps.title: M mimic views
steps.body: Additional mimic sub-tabs include Kit, Sequencer Log, Utilities, A/B Banks, Cu-A/Cu-B Banks, Key Parameters, Heat Exchangers, Pressures, Levels, Sequencer, Bank Log, Info, PID.

articles.title: VND-DAQ Live I/O Tab
articles.summary: Monitor live process values, digital outputs and analog outputs.
articles.purpose: Primary operator view during distillation runs.
articles.safety_notes: Alcohol vapour and moving equipment hazards apply on plant.

steps.title: Open Live I/O
steps.body: Select the Live I/O tab.

steps.title: Read analog inputs
steps.body: AI tags display with alarm severity colouring via format_readback (normal/lo/hi/lolo/hihi).

steps.title: Digital outputs
steps.body: DO1–DO7 toggle buttons show ON/OFF state with permit badges.

steps.title: Analog outputs
steps.body: AO section includes P1 PID Control readout and setpoint controls.

articles.title: VND-DAQ Alarm Levels and Priorities
articles.summary: Four alarm levels evaluated per tag: lolo, lo, hi, hihi.
articles.purpose: Understand alarm severity ordering and trip initiation.

steps.title: Severity order
steps.body: ALARM_LEVELS = ['lolo', 'lo', 'hi', 'hihi'] — most severe checked first in determine_alarm_level().

steps.title: Low alarms
steps.body: lolo and lo trigger when value <= threshold.

steps.title: High alarms
steps.body: hi and hihi trigger when value >= threshold.

steps.title: Enable flags
steps.body: Each level has enabled and value in tag config; disabled levels are skipped.

articles.title: VND-DAQ Alarm Acknowledgement
articles.summary: Acknowledge active alarms from the Alarms tab.
articles.purpose: Confirm operator awareness before reset or continuation.

steps.title: Open Alarms tab
steps.body: View alarm-log-table refreshed by alarm-log-interval.

steps.title: Acknowledge one
steps.body: Click Acknowledge button (id ack-button, index tag|level) → acknowledge_alarm().

steps.title: Acknowledge all
steps.body: Use ack-all-button to acknowledge all active alarms.

steps.title: Trip association
steps.body: Table shows associated TRIP rows from trip_initiators_map for tag|level keys.

articles.title: VND-DAQ Trip Overview
articles.summary: Trips are automated safety actions triggered by alarm conditions.
articles.purpose: Understand trip status display and reset workflow.
articles.safety_notes: Do not bypass trips or interlocks.

steps.title: Trip panel
steps.body: M mimic shows Trip Status panel (render_trip_mimic_panel) with badges per trip_id.

steps.title: Active trip
steps.body: Red badge shows trip_id and initiator tag when trip_global_status.active is True.

steps.title: Reset pending
steps.body: Reset button (trip-reset-btn) enabled when reset_pending is True.

steps.title: Trip engine
steps.body: trigger_trip_action() executes configured actions: DO/AO writes, interlocks, email alerts.

articles.title: VND-DAQ Trip Reset Procedure
articles.summary: Reset a trip after the initiating condition is cleared.
articles.purpose: Safely return equipment to service after a trip event.
articles.safety_notes: [VERIFY WITH OPERATOR] Confirm plant-specific reset prerequisites before enabling reset.

steps.title: Verify cause cleared
steps.body: Confirm initiating alarm condition is no longer active.

steps.title: Check trip badge
steps.body: Trip badge shows reset_pending when reset is allowed.

steps.title: Click Reset
steps.body: Press Reset button (trip-reset-btn) for the trip_id.

steps.title: Confirm
steps.body: trip-reset-confirmation area shows outcome; reset_trip() clears interlocks per trip config.

articles.title: VND-DAQ Permissives — Understanding PERMIT OK / BLOCKED
articles.summary: Permissives gate operator actions on DO and AO tags.
articles.purpose: Prevent unsafe equipment operation.

steps.title: Badge display
steps.body: PERMIT OK (green) or PERMIT BLOCKED (red) badges on DO toggles and AO controls.

steps.title: Configuration
steps.body: Rules loaded from assets/permissives_config.json via permissives_engine.

steps.title: Evaluation
steps.body: evaluate_permissives() checks groups of conditions against live_data and do_state.

steps.title: Fail closed
steps.body: Missing sensor values or failed conditions block the permit.

articles.title: VND-DAQ Common Permissive Failures
articles.summary: Diagnose why a permissive is blocked using reason strings.
articles.purpose: Speed up troubleshooting during startup.

steps.title: Read badge/tooltip
steps.body: DO permit tooltip shows 'Permissive check pending' until evaluated.

steps.title: Check reasons
steps.body: evaluate_permissives returns failure reasons like 'SOURCE logic value' for each failed condition.

steps.title: Verify inputs
steps.body: Conditions read AI values from live_data or DO states from do_state.

steps.title: Review config
steps.body: Inspect assets/permissives_config.json for the tag's groups and logic (all/any).

articles.title: VND-DAQ Interlocks
articles.summary: Interlocks prevent DO/AO changes while a trip owns the tag.
articles.purpose: Protect equipment when safety trips are active.

steps.title: Locked badge
steps.body: interlock_badge shows LOCKED by {owners} when tag is in interlocked_do_tags or interlocked_ao_tags.

steps.title: Trip actions
steps.body: trigger_trip_action sets interlock ownership via interlock_owners_do/ao.

steps.title: Free state
steps.body: Green 'Free' badge when no interlock active.

articles.title: VND-DAQ P1 PID — Manual Mode
articles.summary: Operate P1 pump in manual mode without PID loop.
articles.purpose: Direct control during commissioning or maintenance.

steps.title: Set mode
steps.body: p1-pid-mode or mimic-p1-pid-mode state value 'manual' (stored in live input state).

steps.title: PID loop behaviour
steps.body: run_pid_loop returns immediately when mode != 'auto'.

steps.title: Manual output
steps.body: [VERIFY WITH OPERATOR] Use mimic AO controls to set P1 output manually when not in auto.

articles.title: VND-DAQ P1 PID — Auto Mode
articles.summary: Automatic level control: LIT1 measurement drives P1 pump output.
articles.purpose: Maintain still feed level automatically.

steps.title: Enable auto
steps.body: Set p1-pid-mode to 'auto'.

steps.title: Loop execution
steps.body: start_pid_thread runs run_pid_loop every 1s for tag P1.

steps.title: Measurement
steps.body: Process variable from ss.latest_row LIT1; setpoint from p1-pid-sp (default 150.0 mm).

steps.title: Output
steps.body: PID output written via write_ao_setpoint; logged to datawarehouse insert_point/insert_event.

articles.title: VND-DAQ PID Setpoint and Tuning Changes
articles.summary: Adjust PID setpoint, gains and output limits from the PID mimic tab.
articles.purpose: Tune level control for stable operation.

steps.title: Open PID tab
steps.body: M mimic → PID sub-tab.

steps.title: Setpoint
steps.body: Adjust p1-pid-sp or p1-pid-sp-mimic in live input state.

steps.title: Tuning
steps.body: Kp/Ki/Kd from p1-pid-kp, p1-pid-ki, p1-pid-kd (defaults 0.01, 0.0, 0.0).

steps.title: Limits
steps.body: Output clamped by p1-pid-limit-lower (0.0) and p1-pid-limit-upper (2.0) L/min.

articles.title: VND-DAQ Historian — Reviewing Trends
articles.summary: Review historical process data on configurable trend charts.
articles.purpose: Analyse batch performance and troubleshoot past events.

steps.title: History charts
steps.body: callbacks_history registers chart callbacks with default configs (Temperature, Flow, Pressures, DO, AO/PID, Levels).

steps.title: Query data
steps.body: query_timeseries_decimated from datawarehouse for selected tags and time range.

steps.title: Configure charts
steps.body: Chart configs stored in assets/history_chart_configs.json; positions in history_positions.json.

steps.title: Add charts
steps.body: add-chart-btn opens preset-modal for new chart configuration.

articles.title: VND-DAQ Historian — Exporting Data
articles.summary: Export historical data for external analysis.
articles.purpose: Support quality investigations and engineering review.

steps.title: Data source
steps.body: Historian uses datawarehouse SQLite/event storage (insert_point, query_events).

steps.title: Mobile export
steps.body: mobile_data_export.py provides export utilities for mobile integration.

steps.title: Chart export
steps.body: [VERIFY WITH OPERATOR] Confirm current UI export button behaviour on history charts.

articles.title: VND-DAQ Config Tab — Tag and Alarm Configuration
articles.summary: View and edit AI/AO scaling and alarm thresholds.
articles.purpose: Maintain instrument configuration.

steps.title: Open Config tab
steps.body: Select Config tab → Tag & Alarm Configuration.

steps.title: AI section
steps.body: Analog Inputs from tag_config_input.json: eng_min, eng_max, lolo/lo/hi/hihi thresholds.

steps.title: AO section
steps.body: Analog Outputs from tag_config_output.json with same fields.

steps.title: Persistence
steps.body: [VERIFY WITH OPERATOR] Confirm whether Config tab inputs write back to JSON or are display-only at runtime.

articles.title: VND-DAQ Event Log
articles.summary: Review system events including alarms, trips and PID actions.
articles.purpose: Audit trail for operations and troubleshooting.

steps.title: Open Event Log tab
steps.body: Select Event Log tab.

steps.title: Event sources
steps.body: insert_event records ALARM_ACK, TRIP_INIT, TRIP_LOG, PID_OUTPUT to datawarehouse.

steps.title: Callbacks
steps.body: callbacks_event_log.py renders the event log table.

articles.title: VND-DAQ AB Sequencer and Bank Switching
articles.summary: A/B bank sequencer for automated feedstock switching.
articles.purpose: Operate dual-bank distillation sequences.

steps.title: Engine init
steps.body: main.py initializes ab_sequencer engine on startup.

steps.title: M mimic banks
steps.body: A/B Banks and Cu-A/Cu-B Banks tabs in mimic view.

steps.title: Sequencer tab
steps.body: Sequencer and Bank Log tabs show sequence state and history.

steps.title: Startup sequencer
steps.body: startup_sequencer.py provides automated startup sequences.

articles.title: VND-DAQ Scale and Weight Integration
articles.summary: IND560 and scale reader threads feed weight data into DAQ.
articles.purpose: Support gravimetric measurements during production.

steps.title: Scale thread
steps.body: start_scale_thread() launched from main.py.

steps.title: IND560
steps.body: start_ind560_thread when IND560_ENABLE=1 (Ethernet/IP via ind560_reader.py).

steps.title: Mobile charts
steps.body: vnd_mobile/ui/charts_tab.py displays weight trends on mobile companion app.

articles.title: VND-DAQ Chiller Integration
articles.summary: Modbus chiller communication on COM3.
articles.purpose: Monitor and control cooling utilities.

steps.title: Thread start
steps.body: modbus_chiller.start_chiller_thread() from main.py.

steps.title: Callbacks
steps.body: callbacks_chiller.py handles chiller UI updates.

steps.title: Monitor
steps.body: chiller_communication_monitor.py tracks comms health.

articles.title: VND-DAQ Valve Control
articles.summary: Unified valve control system with feedback and permissives.
articles.purpose: Operate process valves safely from mimic or Live I/O.

steps.title: Initialization
steps.body: share_state.initialize_valve_control() on startup.

steps.title: Callbacks
steps.body: callbacks_valve.py and callbacks_mimic.py handle valve interactions.

steps.title: Feedback
steps.body: Valve feedback tracked for open/closed confirmation.

articles.title: VND Mobile Companion App
articles.summary: Mobile Dash app for remote monitoring of DAQ status, alarms and charts.
articles.purpose: Allow off-site monitoring of distillery DAQ data.

steps.title: Location
steps.body: vnd_mobile/ subproject with separate app.py.

steps.title: Tabs
steps.body: status_tab, alarms_tab, charts_tab, events_tab, bank_sequence_tab.

steps.title: Data sources
steps.body: http_source or file_source reads exported/mobile API data.

articles.title: VND-DAQ Digital Output Toggle Operation
articles.summary: Toggle DO1–DO7 outputs from Live I/O when permitted.
articles.purpose: Control pumps, valves and ancillary equipment.
articles.safety_notes: Only operate DOs when permissives are OK and interlocks are free.

steps.title: Locate DO section
steps.body: Live I/O → Digital Outputs (DO1–DO7).

steps.title: Check permit
steps.body: Confirm PERMIT OK badge before toggling.

steps.title: Toggle
steps.body: Click {tag}-toggle button; colour shows success (ON) or secondary (OFF).

steps.title: Interlock check
steps.body: If LOCKED badge shown, resolve trip before operating.

articles.title: VND-DAQ Trip Email Alerts
articles.summary: Email notifications sent when trips execute.
articles.purpose: Alert off-site personnel to safety events.

steps.title: Trigger
steps.body: trigger_trip_action calls email_alert.send_trip_email(trip_id, name).

steps.title: Configuration
steps.body: [VERIFY WITH OPERATOR] Review email_alert.py SMTP settings and recipient lists.

articles.title: VND-DAQ Graceful Shutdown
articles.summary: Application shutdown cleans up DAQ tasks and threads.
articles.purpose: Prevent orphaned NI-DAQ tasks on exit.

steps.title: Signal handling
steps.body: SIGINT/SIGTERM invoke cleanup_handler in main.py.

steps.title: Stop DAQ loop
steps.body: _daq_stop_event set; daq_thread joined with timeout.

steps.title: Close tasks
steps.body: close_open_tasks() releases hardware tasks.

steps.title: PID thread
steps.body: PID controller thread started after DAQ; stops with application.

articles.title: VND-DAQ Mimic — Key Parameters and Heat Exchangers
articles.summary: Focused mimic views for critical process variables.
articles.purpose: Monitor key operating parameters during a run.

steps.title: Key Parameters tab
steps.body: M mimic → Key Parameters (tab value key).

steps.title: Heat Exchangers
steps.body: Heat Exchangers tab (value hex).

steps.title: Pressures and Levels
steps.body: Pressures and Levels tabs for PT and LIT tags.

articles.title: VND-DAQ Cu Sequencer
articles.summary: Copper bank sequencer (Cu-A / Cu-B) for sequential operations.
articles.purpose: Automate copper catalyst bank switching.

steps.title: Cu banks tab
steps.body: M mimic → Cu-A/Cu-B Banks.

steps.title: Engine
steps.body: cu_sequencer.py implements copper bank sequence logic.

steps.title: Monitor
steps.body: Bank Log tab shows sequence history.

articles.title: VND-DAQ Config Callbacks and Persistence
articles.summary: Configuration changes via callbacks_config.
articles.purpose: Understand how runtime config updates are applied.

steps.title: Callbacks
steps.body: callbacks/callbacks_config.py registers config save handlers.

steps.title: Tag files
steps.body: tag_config_input.json and tag_config_output.json loaded by config_tab.

steps.title: Verify
steps.body: [VERIFY WITH OPERATOR] Confirm save button behaviour and file write permissions on production PC.

articles.title: VND-DAQ DAQ Loop and Live Data
articles.summary: Core data acquisition loop populates live_data and share_state.
articles.purpose: Understand where Live I/O values originate.

steps.title: Start loop
steps.body: start_daq_loop(share_state, stop_event) in dedicated thread.

steps.title: State
steps.body: live_data, ao_state, do_state, di_state updated under daq_lock.

steps.title: Alarms
steps.body: evaluate_alarms called as part of acquisition cycle.

articles.title: VND-DAQ Alarm and Trip Data Warehouse
articles.summary: SQLite data warehouse stores points and events for historian and audit.
articles.purpose: Support trend queries and post-incident review.

steps.title: Point insert
steps.body: insert_point(tag, kind, value) for PID and process values.

steps.title: Events
steps.body: insert_event for ALARM_ACK, TRIP_INIT, TRIP_LOG, PID_OUTPUT.

steps.title: Query
steps.body: query_events and query_timeseries_decimated for history views.
